headline: Barclays Says Honeywell (HON) Has Clear Catalysts as Spinoffs Near
summary: Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) is included among the Billionaire George Soros Stock Portfolio: 10 Best Stocks to Buy. On May 27, Barclays raised its price recommendation on Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) to $251 from $243. It reiterated an Overweight rating on the shares. The firm said Honeywell has “clear catalysts ahead,” pointing to two upcoming […]
